span.p:
MetadataController
Exposes types to NSwag
that have no endpoint

div.style: color: rgb(192, 192, 192) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Target 1: GenerateClient
NSwag (ASP.NET Core → OpenAPI 3.0)
nswag.json

div.style: color: rgb(192, 192, 192) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Target 2: GenerateZodSchemas
pnpm run generate-zod-schemas
OpenAPI JSON Schema → Zod validators

div.style: color: rgb(192, 192, 192) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Target 3: GenerateRemoteFunctions
npx openapi-remote-codegen
Reads [Remote*] annotations from spec
